title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series: Ep18 - Easy Photo to Cartoon Transformation!
description:
Learn how to transform your photos into charming cartoon characters in episode 18 of our ComfyUI tutorial series! In this video, we explore simple techniques to convert images of people, animals, and even objects into creative cartoon versions. You'll discover various workflows using SDXL, Flux, and a combination of both for flexibility. We'll guide you through setting up the latest ComfyUI features, including how to update the interface and manage workflows efficiently.

You'll also learn how to:

- Use the SDXL model for cartoon-style transformations.
- Optimize image resolutions for the best results.
- Experiment with Flux and SDXL together for extra fine details.

Perfect for beginners and experienced users alike, this episode will help you create unique cartoon images with ease. Plus, download the recommended models from Civit AI and test your own creative variations! Don’t forget to join our community on Discord for more workflows and support. https://discord.gg/gggpkVgBf3


Unlo
